bird.summary: The paradise riflebird (Ptiloris paradiseus) is a passerine bird of the family Paradisaeidae. It is one of four riflebird species in the ge…

locations.name: 溫帶雨林
locations.summary: 温带季雨林通称溫帶雨林，是地球上中緯度的高雨量地區的針葉樹或闊葉樹季雨林。它們大多數位於海洋性濕潤氣候區，例如北美洲西北部（自加州西北部至阿拉斯加東南部）、歐洲西北部（英國、愛爾蘭、挪威）、智利南部、澳洲東南部（塔斯曼尼亞省、維多利亞省）…

locations.name: 澳洲東岸
locations.summary: 澳大利亚东岸（East Coast of Australia），又称为澳洲东部诸州（eastern states of Australia）或东部沿海（eastern seaboard），是指位於澳大利亚大陆东部海岸线的数个南太平洋沿岸州…

relations.subject: Paradise riflebird
relations.evidence: It is found in subtropical, temperate rainforests in eastern Australia

relations.subject: Paradise riflebird
relations.evidence: The paradise riflebird is endemic to eastern Australia, from New South Wales to Queensland, where it inhabits rainforests

relations.subject: Paradise riflebird
relations.evidence: Boatbills to Starlings}} It is highly vulnerable to deforestation and rainforest fragmentation due to its sedentary lifestyle and low population density, and has lost much of its original habitat. Currently, it is listed as a species of Least Concern, though its numbers are declining
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
